## Mock-only Confirmation

- [ ] I confirm this report contains no real evidence or private material.
- [ ] I did not include real WeChat chats, real Git data, real recordings, real company names, real person names, real project names, real amounts, real addresses, real phone numbers, or identifiable case details.

## Affected Area

Which file, script, template, or documentation page may allow real information to leak?

## Mock-only Reproduction

Describe the concern using fictional mock data only.

Do not attach real screenshots, exports, recordings, source files, contracts, or private service material.

## Risk

Explain why this could weaken the mock-only boundary.

## Suggested Fix

Describe a safe fix if you have one.
